Class StagnationRestartPolicy<G>

java.lang.Object
com.knezevic.edaf.v3.core.api.defaults.StagnationRestartPolicy<G>
All Implemented Interfaces:
RestartPolicy<G>
public final class StagnationRestartPolicy<G> extends Object implements RestartPolicy<G>
Restart policy that triggers after a fixed number of non-improving iterations.
